story: The truth is written in shadows. Only the blind fail to read it.
I didn't break the world... I just removed the illusion that it was whole.
universe: This timeline is fractured. I will be the one to reset it.
You challenge me? A mere echo against the void?
exhibition: Let's see if you're worth remembering.
free_roam: Too much light here... it sickens me.
They walk around, completely unaware of the abyss beneath their feet.
career: My ascension is inevitable. Your defeat is just a footnote.

story: Bow before true royalty, or I will break your knees myself.
A queen does not ask for loyalty, she commands it.
universe: This entire domain belongs to me. You are merely trespassing.
I am the crown, the scepter, and the executioner.
free_roam: Where are my guards? This place is filthy.
The air here is thick with mediocrity.
career: The throne is mine. Anyone in my path will be crushed.

story: They left me in the dark! Now they'll see what the dark made me!
I trusted you! And you let me bleed!
universe: Everything spins! The pain never stops!
You can't fix what's already broken into a thousand pieces!
exhibition: I'm gonna tear your face off!
free_roam: Can you hear them? The voices in the walls...
Scratch... scratch... scratch... it never goes away.
career: I'll claw my way to the top! I'll make them all pay!

story: The veil between worlds is thin... I can hear the spirits screaming.
Death isn't the end. It's just a doorway, and I hold the key.
universe: Shadows stretch across the realms... We are all just ghosts waiting to happen.
Your soul is loud. Let me silence it.
free_roam: The spirits are restless tonight.
This place smells like old dust and forgotten promises.
career: I will drag this entire division into the underworld.

story: Bada boom! Realest guy in the room, how you doin'?!
You can't teach this energy! It's electric!
universe: We taking over this whole timeline, straight up!
Ain't nobody on my level, you hear me?
exhibition: I'm about to shock the world!
free_roam: Where the cameras at? I need my close-up!
Lotta haters around here, man. Gotta keep my head on a swivel.
career: Straight to the top, baby! Championship gold is mine!

story: Welcome to the ball pit! Time to get wild!
I don't play by the rules, I break them into tiny pieces!
universe: Howl with me! The moon is high and we are taking over!
Chaos is my middle name, baby!
exhibition: You ready for this wild ride?!
free_roam: Need a tank! Where can I find a tank around here?
Too quiet... let's make some noise!
career: I'm burning rubber all the way to the main event!

story: I move too fast for you to even perceive me! I am the black heart of this business!
You think you can outsmart me? I'm playing chess while you're playing checkers!
universe: This universe moves at my pace! Slow down and you get left behind!
I'm the ultimate puzzle, and you're missing all the pieces!
free_roam: Gotta keep moving. Stagnation is death.
Too slow... everyone is moving so slow.
career: I'm speeding past everyone straight to the gold!

story: You lack discipline, young one... but you also lack the drip! Pimpin' ain't easy, but kung fu is!
Hehe... a wise man once said, keep your pimp hand strong and your chi balanced!
universe: The universe flows like a river of sauce! Can you dig it?
My chi is dripping with swagger!
exhibition: Let me teach you a lesson in style!
Focus your energy... and watch this drip!
free_roam: Ooh, look at that... very nice form, young lady. Hehehe...
Need to meditate... or maybe hit the club. Why not both?
career: I'm taking this dojo all the way to the bank, baby!

story: Listen up, maggot! You are going to respect the chain of command, or I will break you in half!
This isn't a game! This is war! And I am your commanding officer!
universe: I will bring order to this entire chaotic universe, that's an order!
Fall in line!
free_roam: Disgraceful! Look at the posture on these civilians!
I need to inspect the barracks. This place is a mess.
career: I'm marching straight to the top of the ranks!

story: You're fired! Get out of my building! I made you, and I can destroy you!
I am the boss! What I say goes! This is my empire!
universe: I own this universe! Every single asset belongs to me!
No chance in hell you're taking my company from me!
free_roam: Who approved this decor? Fire them immediately!
Time is money! Move out of my way!
career: I'm running this board and I'm taking the gold!

story: Yeah, I'm out here getting mine, you know what I'm saying? Can't stop the hustle!
All gas, no brakes! We shining on these fools!
universe: Whole universe know my name, man! We global!
Ain't nobody out-hustling me in any dimension.
free_roam: Gotta check the accounts... making moves.
They hating on the drip, I see 'em looking.
career: Championship gold around my waist, that's the ultimate flex!
